features: 🌟 Cherished Keepsake for Special Moments: Celebrate cherished occasions like Christenings, Baptisms, and birthdays with our personalised baby bib. Customise it with your baby's name to create a heartwarming item that will be treasured for years. Perfect for both girls and boys, making every moment memorable

👶 Ultimate Comfort and Style: Crafted from a soft blend of 65% Polyester and 35% Cotton, our personalised baby bib ensures all-day comfort for your little one. With its gentle fabric, it is ideal for daily wear during special ceremonies or as a memorable keepsake for newborns

🍼 Easy Nappy Changes: Designed with convenience in mind, our baby bib features 3 nickel-free poppers for easy nappy changes. This thoughtful design ensures your baby stays happy and comfortable, making it a practical choice for busy parents during Christenings and Baptisms

🎁 Versatile and Customisable: Whether you choose a baby bib, baby grow, or a complete set, our personalised products offer a unique touch for any occasion. Ideal for Christenings, Baptisms, and other celebrations, these items are perfect for creating lasting memories and expressing blessings

🧺 Easy Care Instructions: To maintain the fabric and prevent shrinkage, machine wash the bib inside out with similar colours on a gentle cycle at a maximum temperature of 30 degrees Celsius. Avoid bleach and tumble dry on low heat or air dry to keep the bib looking its best
description: Product Description Your Hoodie, Your way At Crafted Memories , we offer a fully personalised clothing experience. Choose from a variety of garment colours, thread colours, and styles. Customise each piece to reflect your unique style. Your clothing, your way. Tech Specs The Perfect Pair Discover the perfect pair for the little ones with our Personalised Bib and Baby Grow set by Crafted Memories . Tailored to match seamlessly, this duo is designed to create heartwarming moments that make a statement on any occasion. Whether it's for a newborn's welcome, a christening celebration, a milestone birthday, or those precious firsts that become cherished memories, this beautifully personalised set is a thoughtful gift that adds a touch of love to every occasion. Crafted to order and uniquely personalised to your specifications, this set becomes a cherished keepsake that parents and little ones alike will treasure. The Perfect Fit The bib in this set is designed for convenience with a one-size-fits-all design and adjustable Velcro strap for a snug yet comfortable fit. The Baby Grow cater to different stages of infancy with sizes from newborn to 24 months, including 0-3, 3-6, 6-12, 12-18, and 18-24 months. Crafted Memories offers thoughtfully designed pieces that make dressing your little one a joy. Your Style At Crafted Memories , we offer an ever-growing collection of personalised bibs and Baby Grow, with dozens of styles to choose from. Our range includes delightful designs tailored for newborns, initials to add a personalised touch, themes for first birthdays, charming christening motifs, and styles perfect for religious holidays. Explore our expansive selection to find the ideal look for your little one, with new styles being added regularly. Your Personalisation Each style in our collection offers varying levels of personalisation, allowing you to create a truly unique gift. From selecting your preferred colours to adding personalised text, our customisation options let you tailor each bib and Baby Grow to your exact specifications. Whether you want to showcase a special name or a significant date, our wide range of personalisation features makes it easy to design a bespoke item that will be cherished for years to come. At Crafted Memories, we're dedicated to helping you capture the perfect look for every special occasion. Matching Teddy Bear To complete the set, we offer an adorable matching teddy bear that complements our personalised bibs and Baby Grow perfectly. Crafted with the same attention to detail and customisation options, this teddy bear brings an extra touch of warmth and charm to your gift. With options for personalisation, it makes a delightful keepsake that the child will cherish as they grow. Whether it's for a newborn's nursery or to celebrate a significant milestone, this matching teddy bear adds an extra layer of thoughtfulness and completes the ensemble beautifully. Why Crafted Memories? Crafted Memories, initially known as Gifts Handmade, sprouted from a family’s ambition to transform the gift market. Faced with the difficulty of discovering unique, small gifts that encapsulate the spirit of special moments, we saw an opportunity to introduce something more personal and heartfelt. Our venture began with crafting not just gifts, but enduring memories. As we continue to evolve, our foundational values remain steadfast. We are committed to delivering more than just gifts; we aim to provide cherished keepsakes that carry deep personal significance. Each item in our expanding collection is crafted with care, ensuring that it stands as a symbol of affection and thoughtfulness. Embark on this journey with us at Crafted Memories, where every celebration is an opportunity to share a meaningful and personalized gift. Whether it’s a handmade gift, a custom keychain, or a personalized teddy bear, each item is designed to convey emotions and preserve memories, making every occasion unforgettable.
